## Evidence — Node n2 (Gitea lane) — Issue #278 (mirror of n1)

### RED (before implementation)
`node plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/test-gitea-forge-helpers.js`:
- TypeError: forge.deleteIssueComment is not a function (test line 213)
Failing tests:
1. deleteIssueComment: correct DELETE call — RED
2. clearAdvisoryClaim: project-scoped match deletes only target marker — RED
3. clearAdvisoryClaim: generic-regex fallback deletes all project= markers — RED
4. clearAdvisoryClaim: non-marker notes from other sessions not deleted — RED
5. clearAdvisoryClaim: OFFLINE mode makes no network calls — RED

### GREEN (after implementation)
All 5 new tests + prior tests pass; exit 0.
"Gitea forge helper tests passed", "All clearAdvisoryClaim marker-deletion tests passed".

### Files changed (3, all in declared write set)
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-forge.js: added deleteIssueComment(project, issueNum, commentId, opts) -> teaExec(['api','-X','DELETE','/api/v1/repos/<full_name>/issues/comments/<id>']); exported. Mirrors updateIssueComment path/seam.
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-claim.js: clearAdvisoryClaim signature +project slug (4th arg); after label removal + cleared comment, lists comments, deletes kw:claim marker (project-scoped `<!-- kw:claim project=<slug> -->` preferred, generic /<!--\s*kw:claim\s+project=/ fallback), try/catch never-throws, OFFLINE guarded. Updated all 4 call sites (finalize=args.project; release, pr-merged, pr-closed=folder.project). Exported clearAdvisoryClaim.
- plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/test-gitea-forge-helpers.js: 5 new assertions (RED-first).
